tools.name: get_comps
tools.description: Return a comparable-company set with consistent metric definitions.

tools.name: get_quote
tools.description: Return a current quote (price, market cap, 52-week range) for a ticker.

tools.name: get_market_events
tools.description: Return recent market events; optionally filter to one `ticker`.

tools.name: get_estimates
tools.description: Return forward street estimates for a ticker; optionally filter by `period`.
